result:
30/30 tests pass. Here's what was added to the existing v1 implementation:

- **`status`** - reads index and prints staged filenames (or `(none)`)
- **`diff`** - parses two commit files and reports Added/Removed/Modified files
- **`checkout`** - restores blobs to working directory, updates HEAD, clears index
- **`reset`** - updates HEAD and clears index without touching working files
- **`rm`** - removes a filename from the index, errors if not staged
- **`show`** - displays commit metadata and file list with two-space indent
- **`parse_commit`** helper subroutine shared by diff, checkout, and show
- Fixed `do_add` to update the hash in-place when a file is re-staged with new content
